data.title: Mohammed Murad from PT Asset Management named to Smith's 2025 All-Star Second Team for Director of Municipal Credit Research.
data.description: In Chicago on December 4, 2025, PT Asset Management, LLC (PTAM) revealed that Mohammed Murad, the Director of Municipal Credit Research, was honored on Smith's 2025 All-Star Second Team in the Buyside Director of Research division. This accolade is part of the yearly Smith's All-Star Ballot, an esteemed recognition within the industry.

data.title: Fratarcangeli Wealth Management ranked No. 1 in Michigan on Forbes' Top Wealth Management Teams, top 40 nationwide.
data.description: Fratarcangeli Wealth Management (FWM), a firm based in Bloomfield Hills, Michigan, has been recognized as one of the top 40 wealth management firms in the United States. The firm, specializing in high-net-worth wealth advisory services, achieved the ranking of No. 1 in Michigan. This achievement was announced on December 4, 2025, solidifying FWM's position among the leading wealth management firms nationwide.

data.title: Medtronic Scores FDA Win As Hugo Surgical Robot Enters 230,000 Urology Procedure Market
data.description: The FDA has approved Medtronic Plc's Hugo robotic-assisted surgery system for urologic procedures. This clearance allows U.S. surgeons access to a versatile platform for soft-tissue robotic surgery. The Hugo system is now indicated for minimally invasive urologic surgeries like prostatectomy, nephrectomy, and cystectomy. These procedures, totaling around 230,000 surgeries annually in the U.S., stand to benefit from this advanced technology. A clinical study showed that the Hugo system met primary safety and effectiveness criteria. Medtronic's stock (NYSE: MDT) responded positively to this news, reflecting investor confidence. More details can be found online.

data.title: Pepe memecoin site hacked, leading users to malware: Blockaid warns to avoid the compromised site.
data.description: The Pepe memecoin's website recently experienced a front-end attack, leading to concerns about its security. Users are advised to avoid visiting the website until the issue is resolved.

data.title: Circle debuts USDCx on Canton for improved blockchain compatibility. USDC can now work seamlessly across various blockchains.
data.description: Circle has introduced USDCx on Canton through xReserve, allowing for easy USDC compatibility on various blockchains, improving privacy and settlement speed. This move aims to enhance the functionality of USDC across different platforms.

data.title: Starknet adds native USDC & CCTP, improving DeFi & payments w/ crosschain transfers, boosting opportunities in its ecosystem.
data.description: Starknet has successfully integrated native support for two major cryptocurrencies, USDC and CCTP, significantly enhancing the capabilities of decentralized finance (DeFi), gaming, and payment sectors. Through this integration, users can now benefit from seamless and secure crosschain transfers on a scalable platform. This development opens up a plethora of new possibilities within the expanding Starknet ecosystem. Join the Starknet community to capitalize on these exciting advancements. Explore the enhanced functionalities and opportunities that come with the integration of USDC and CCTP on Starknet.

data.title: Datacor acquires VDISoft, a QC software developer, to expand quality and lab solutions. Acquisition announced on Dec. 4, 2025.
data.description: In Florham Park, New Jersey, on December 4, 2025, Datacor, Inc., a prominent company specializing in process manufacturing, chemical distribution, and engineering software, disclosed its acquisition of VDISoft. VDISoft is a well-established developer known for creating tailor-made quality control (QC) software. This strategic acquisition marks an important development in the industry.
Putin and Modi arrived at the Indian Prime Minister's residence

data.title: Salesforce beats Q3 earnings with $10.26 billion revenue, exceeding EPS at $3.25. Predicts strong Q4 growth. CEO cites success in Agentforce and Data 360 products.
data.description: Cloud computing company Salesforce Inc. (NYSE: CRM) announced impressive third-quarter results, surpassing expectations. The company reported third-quarter revenue of $10.26 billion, slightly below the projected $10.27 billion. However, adjusted earnings per share were reported at $3.25, significantly higher than the anticipated $2.86 per share. The Chair and CEO, Marc Benioff, credited the success to the momentum generated by their Agentforce and Data 360 products, which achieved nearly $1.4 billion in ARR, marking a 114% year-over-year increase. Salesforce has secured over 9,500 paid Agentforce deals and processed 3.2 trillion tokens, reinforcing their position in developing the Agentic Enterprise and delivering tangible results. The company has revised its FY26 guidance upwards following these strong results. Salesforce foresees fourth-quarter revenue falling within their forecasted range. More information can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: WTW launches Radar Fusion to enhance commercial underwriting with augmented technology, aiding insurers in efficient decision-making in a dynamic market.
data.description: Cutting-edge augmented underwriting technology called Radar Fusion is aiding insurers in enhancing decision-making processes within the rapidly evolving market. This innovative tool assists in streamlining and expanding underwriting operations, resulting in more efficient and effective decision-making. Utilizing Radar Fusion enables insurers to keep pace with market demands and make informed choices.

data.title: XYRA Corp. to focus on Honduras for remittance & digital transfers. Subsidiary of Cavitation Tech designates Honduras as priority market.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, XYRA Corp, a subsidiary of Cavitation Technologies, Inc. (OTCQB: CVAT), based in Chatsworth, California, unveiled plans to prioritize Honduras as a key expansion market. This decision is a crucial component of the company's growth strategy in Central America. XYRA Corp is known for its AI-powered, quantum-secure payment network that brings together remittances, fintech, and crypto assets using a tokenized and compliant framework. Honduras will now receive special focus as XYRA Corp aims to strengthen its presence in the region.

data.title: Sunrise New Energy granted patent CN 116454229 B for lithium cerate-coated graphite iron oxide anode material, supporting advancement in solid-state batteries.
data.description: In Dover, USA, on Dec. 04, 2025, Sunrise New Energy Co., Ltd. (NASDAQ: EPOW) revealed that its subsidiary, Sunrise (Guizhou) New Energy Materials Co., Ltd., has received an invention patent for the "Preparation Method of Lithium Cerate–Coated Graphite Iron Oxide Anode Material". The patent, sanctioned by the China National Intellectual Property Administration with announcement number CN 116454229 B and patent number ZL 2023 1 0367815.2, focuses on advanced solid-state battery anode materials. This innovative technology marks a significant stride in the Company's progress in high-performance energy-storage materials.

data.title: Holland America Line sets U.S. bookings record with 19% increase during Black Friday weekend, led by Alaska cruises.
data.description: Alaska cruises are currently topping the charts in bookings, with guests eager to explore the Great Land's stunning glaciers, wildlife encounters, and authentic Alaska experiences. Setting a new record during the Black Friday weekend in the United States, Holland America Line witnessed a significant surge in sales, marking a 19% increase compared to previous years. The company's success in attracting travelers seeking the ultimate Alaskan adventure showcases the growing popularity of cruise vacations centered around the majestic landscapes and unique offerings of the region.
